items.briefing:
Australian organisations are being urged to strengthen ransomware defences, with security experts warning that current protections may not be keeping pace with threats. Adding to this concern, a Google report confirms that AI is now routinely used in cyberattacks, making threats faster and harder to detect. Separately, Canvas learning platform developer Instructure has reached an agreement with hackers following a breach — a reminder that education-sector platforms used by many Australian RTOs can be targets.

On scams, Binance reports its AI tools blocked over $10.5 billion in crypto scam funds, highlighting the ongoing scale of cryptocurrency fraud targeting everyday Australians. **Tip:** If you receive unexpected messages about cryptocurrency investments or account alerts, do not click links — go directly to the official website instead.
